attacking_style: Pure sprinter who times final kick in last 200-250m, excels at sitting in draft position then launching late. Shows deceptive acceleration reserve and superior timing on uphill gradient finishes.
team_tactics: Relies heavily on organized leadout trains (Alpecin/Bike-Exchange) through final 3-10km with multiple pilots. Performs significantly worse when leadout fractures or malfunctions. Conservation tactics include skipping intermediate sprints when points secure.
terrain_preference: Uphill gradient sprint finishes are his specialty where power-to-weight beats pure speed. Struggles less on technical finales than positioning suggests. Arrow-straight approaches with long leadouts ideal.
vulnerability: Week-two illness in Grand Tours (abandoned Giro, sick multiple times). Late mechanicals (punctures, dropped chains) cost wins. Positioning errors in chaotic sprints when leadout absent. Wheel-touching incidents under 500m.
key_patterns: Excels on uphill sprint finishes, waiting longest to launch on steep gradients (3+ observations)
Week-two Grand Tour vulnerability: illness forced Giro abandon, multiple sickness episodes (4+ observations)
Late mechanicals at critical moments: punctures, dropped chains cost winning positions (3 observations)
Demonstrates tactical green jersey intelligence: skips intermediates, chases threats to points lead (3 observations)
Mental resilience: won after bike changes, mechanicals, team disruptions mid-stage (3 observations)
Performance collapses without intact leadout train in final kilometers (3+ observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Won final Vuelta stage and green jersey 2023 with tactical maturity, prioritizing points over stages and making decisive chase to secure classification.
